narrative:
North Olmsted City has 21,777 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.7 percentage points.
